data.title: sprint-list-epics.sh triggers rebase conflict on tickets branch when local is behind remote
data.description: When running .claude/scripts/dso sprint-list-epics.sh --max-children=0, the script triggers an interactive rebase on the tickets orphan branch. If the local tickets branch is behind origin/tickets, the rebase hits a merge conflict on .gitignore (both added), leaving the tickets worktree in a broken rebase state. This blocks all subsequent ticket CLI operations (create, list, etc.) until manually resolved. Observed during /dso:brainstorm Phase 1 Step 1. Root cause: the ticket CLI auto-rebases the local tickets branch onto origin/tickets, but does not handle .gitignore conflicts gracefully. Workaround: manually resolve the conflict in .tickets-tracker/ and run git rebase --continue.
